title: AI Workspace Knowledge Entry
description: YAML frontmatter block for knowledge/*.md files.

updated.description: Date of last update in ISO 8601 (YYYY-MM-DD).

scopes.description: Domains, tools, or projects this entry applies to.

auto_generated.description: True if this file is machine-generated and should not be edited manually.

source.description: Origin of this knowledge (e.g. session, manual, migration).
